status.pathNotSet.desc: Please detect or select your Dota 2 folder.
status.invalidPath.desc: dota2.exe not found. Please select a valid Dota 2 folder.
status.coreMissing.desc: Core files are missing. Verify game files in Steam.
status.notInstalled.desc: ModsPack is not installed. Click 'Install' to get started.
status.disabled.desc: ModsPack is installed but not active. Click 'Patch Update' to activate.
status.invalidCore.desc: The core files are corrupted. Try reinstalling or verify game files.
status.ready.desc: ModsPack is active and up-to-date. Enjoy your game!
status.invalidPatch.desc: The patch format is incorrect and may cause matchmaking issues. Please run 'Patch Update' to fix.
status.updateRequired.desc: Dota 2 was updated. Please run 'Patch Update' to fix.
status.updateRequiredBuild.desc: Dota 2 was updated ({build}). Run 'Patch Update' to fix.

patch.updateFailed: Patch update failed. Check the log for details.
patch.vpkNotFound: Mod VPK file not found. Please install mods first.

patch.disabledConfirm: Mods are disabled. Enable and patch now?
patch.notInstalled.title: Mods Not Installed
patch.notInstalled.body: Please install mods first using the 'Skin Selector' or 'Miscellaneous' buttons.
verify.failed.title: Verification Failed

verify.vpkCorrupt: VPK file appears corrupted. Please reinstall mods.

mods.upToDate.body:

Reinstall anyway?

mods.invalidFile.title: Invalid File
mods.invalidVpk.title: Invalid VPK
mods.invalidVpk.body:
ModsPack Error.
Please contact developer if this is unexpected.
mods.confirmInstall.title: Confirm Install
mods.confirmInstall.heading: Install VPK Mods
mods.unofficialVpk.title: Unofficial Pack
mods.unofficialVpk.heading: Not an Official ArdysaMods Pack
mods.unofficialVpk.body:
{file} was not created by ArdysaMods.
You can still install it — it will be installed as-is, without ArdysaMods package data.
mods.unofficialVpk.note: Any errors or bugs caused by this pack are not the responsibility of ArdysaMods.
mods.modifiedVpk.title: Modified Pack
mods.modifiedVpk.heading: ArdysaMods Pack Has Been Modified
mods.modifiedVpk.body: {file} looks like an ArdysaMods pack, but its signature does not match the official release.
mods.modifiedVpk.note: Any errors or bugs caused by this pack are not the responsibility of ArdysaMods.
mods.install.manualCompleteBody: ModsPack installed successfully! Your mods are now ready.
mods.install.failedBodyConsole: Installation failed. Check the console for details.
disable.confirm.heading: Delete Mod Files
disable.confirm.body: This permanently deletes all mod files in your Dota 2 folder.
disable.confirm.note: This can't be undone. You'll need to reinstall to use mods again.
disable.restart.heading: Mod Files Deleted
disable.restart.body: All mod files have been removed from your Dota 2 folder. Restart the app to finish up.
disable.toast.failed.title: Disable Failed
disable.toast.failed.body: Mods could not be disabled. Check the console for details.
disable.toast.deleteFailed.title: Files Not Removed
disable.toast.deleteFailed.body: Mods are disabled, but the mod files could not be deleted. Close Dota 2 and try again.
nav.connectionError.title: Connection Error
nav.connectionError.body:
Unable to access this feature.

Please check your internet connection and try again.
The Select Hero feature requires online access to load hero data.
nav.beta.heading: Skin Selector — Beta
nav.beta.body:
This feature is currently in beta. Not all hero sets are available yet.
More hero sets will be added soon!
nav.beta.note: Using this feature will remove your ModsPack. Custom sets are built independently and are NOT linked to the standard ModsPack.
hero.compatAlert.title: Cosmetic Compatibility Alert
hero.baseNoSet.message:
A Base Hero model modification has been selected for {names} without an active Sets selection.

Generating a base model mod without a corresponding custom set can lead to texture clipping or visual conflicts with default equipment.

Are you sure you want to proceed with the current configuration?

hero.noPath.body: No Dota 2 path set. Please set it in the main window first.

program.dota2Running.title: Cannot start — Dota 2 is running
program.dota2Running.body: ArdysaModsTools cannot run while dota2.exe is active. Please close Dota 2 and try again.
program.webview2Required.title: Cannot start — WebView2 Runtime required
program.webview2Required.body: ArdysaModsTools needs the Microsoft Edge WebView2 Runtime, which isn't installed on this PC. Install it from https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/p/?LinkId=2124703 and try again.
onboarding.autoDetect.title: Auto Detect
onboarding.autoDetect.desc:
Automatically finds your Dota 2 installation path.
Click this first to get started!
onboarding.manualDetect.title: Manual Detect
onboarding.manualDetect.desc:
Can't auto-detect? Use this to manually browse
to your Dota 2 game folder.
onboarding.skinSelector.title: Skin Selector
onboarding.skinSelector.desc:
Browse hero cosmetic sets and select the skins
you want to apply to your heroes.
onboarding.misc.title: Miscellaneous
onboarding.misc.desc:
Change weather effects, HUD skins, terrain,
couriers, wards, and other visual mods.
onboarding.install.title: Install ModsPack
onboarding.install.desc:
Apply all your selected mods to Dota 2.
This bundles everything into the game files.
onboarding.patch.title: Patch Update
onboarding.patch.desc:
After a Dota 2 game update, click here to
re-apply your mod patches.
onboarding.console.title: Console Log
onboarding.console.desc:
View real-time operation logs and status
messages here. Useful for troubleshooting.
onboarding.settings.title: Settings
onboarding.settings.desc:
Configure app behavior, manage cache,
check for updates, and more.
installMethod.lead: Choose how you want to install mods.
installMethod.auto.d: Download and install the latest ModsPack automatically from the server.
installMethod.manual.d: Browse and select a VPK file to install manually.
installMethod.manual.lead: Import a VPK mods file (pak01_dir.vpk) from your computer.
installMethod.manual.importD: Browse and select a VPK file from your computer.
installMethod.manual.download: Don't have the file? Download ModsPack
installMethod.manual.drop: Drag & drop your VPK file here
disableOpt.lead: Choose what to do with your installed mods.
disableOpt.disable.d: Temporarily disable mods. You can re-enable them later.
disableOpt.delete.d: Remove all mod files from your game folder. This cannot be undone.
patchReq.title: PATCH UPDATE REQUIRED
patchReq.body: However, Dota 2 files need to be patched for mods to work.
patchReq.clickHint: Click 'Patch Now' to complete the installation.
about.desc: Install, customize, and disable client-side cosmetic mods for Dota 2 — hero skins, weather, terrain, HUD, couriers, wards and more. Mods are applied safely and reversibly, with automatic re-patching after each game update.
about.author: Author
support.title: SUPPORT THE DEVELOPMENT
support.subtitle:
ArdysaModsTools is free and always will be.
Your support helps keep this project alive!
support.footerMsg: ❤ Every contribution helps improve the tool for everyone ❤
featureUnavailable.defaultMessage:
This feature is temporarily unavailable.
Please try again later.
updateAvail.title: A NEW VERSION IS AVAILABLE
updateAvail.updateDesc: Only {size} — downloads just the changed files
updateAvail.failed: Update failed. Use a download link below.
modspackUpd.title: A NEWER MODSPACK IS AVAILABLE
modspackUpd.description:
A new version of the ModsPack has been released.
Update now to get the latest cosmetic mods.
progress.preview.title: ModsPack Preview

miscForm.ethereal.title: ✦ Ethereal Effects
miscForm.tribute.subtitle: This mod was made with ❤ by the community
miscForm.genOnly.name: Generate Only Misc Mods
miscForm.genOnly.desc: Create a clean VPK with only Misc mods
miscForm.addCurrent.name: Add to Current Mods
miscForm.addCurrent.desc: Apply modifications on top of existing game mods
miscForm.tribute.title: Created by Darkness
log.notice.regionCdn: If Downloads or Generate get stuck, it's usually a connection issue with the CDN. Try again, switch networks, or use a VPN (I recommend the free Cloudflare WARP app).
log.autoDetect.notFound: Couldn't detect Dota 2 automatically. Use the highlighted detect buttons to set the path.
log.dota2.running: Dota 2 is still running — operations are disabled until you close the game.
perf.launch.title: [ LAUNCH_OPTIONS ]
perf.launch.steamHint: // steam > right-click dota 2 > properties > launch options
perf.launch.copyHint: // copy-only — NOT written by [ APPLY ]. your selection is remembered automatically.
perf.action.deleteTooltip: Remove the autoexec.cfg this tool wrote to your Dota 2 config folder
perf.banner.recommended: These are recommended preset values — nothing has been written yet. Click [ APPLY TO AUTOEXEC.CFG ] to create the file in your Dota 2 config folder.
perf.cvar.fps_max.label: Max FPS (In-Game)
perf.cvar.fps_max.tip: 0 = uncapped. Match your monitor refresh rate for stability.
perf.cvar.fps_max_ui.label: Dashboard Max FPS
perf.cvar.fps_max_ui.tip: Stops the menu from cooking your GPU.
perf.cvar.mat_viewportscale.label: Render Quality
perf.cvar.mat_viewportscale.tip: Lower = more FPS but softer image. Use with FSR.
perf.cvar.r_fullscreen_gamma.label: Gamma
perf.cvar.dota_portrait_animate.label: Animate Portrait
perf.cvar.r_deferred_additive_pass.label: Additive Light Pass
perf.cvar.r_deferred_additive_pass.tip: Removes extra lighting passes and reflections.
perf.cvar.r_deferred_simple_light.label: World Lighting
perf.cvar.r_deferred_simple_light.tip: Large GPU cost for cosmetic gain. 1=Simple, 0=Off.
perf.cvar.r_ssao.label: Ambient Occlusion
perf.cvar.r_ssao.tip: One of the fastest ways to gain FPS.
perf.cvar.r_dota_normal_maps.label: Normal Maps
Depth effects on terrain, irrelevant in fights.
perf.cvar.dota_ambient_creatures.label: Ambient Creatures
perf.cvar.dota_ambient_cloth.label: Ambient Cloth Sim
perf.cvar.r_grass_quality.label: Grass
perf.cvar.r_grass_quality.tip: Dense ground detail that costs FPS.
perf.cvar.r_dota_fxaa.label: Anti-Aliasing
perf.cvar.r_dota_fxaa.tip: AA is a clarity trade. Off improves sharpness.
perf.cvar.r_deferred_specular.label: Specular
perf.cvar.r_deferred_specular.tip: Reduces shiny highlights and lighting work.
perf.cvar.dota_cheap_water.label: Cheap Water
perf.cvar.dota_cheap_water.tip: 1=cheap water for better FPS near river.
perf.cvar.r_deferred_height_fog.label: Atmospheric Fog
perf.cvar.r_deferred_height_fog.tip: Removes atmospheric effects that spike in fights.
perf.cvar.r_texture_stream_mip_bias.tip: Mostly a VRAM issue. Keep higher for clarity.
perf.cvar.cl_particle_fallback_base.tip: Spell effects spike load. Low = stable.
perf.cvar.cl_globallight_shadow_mode.tip: Shadows are the most expensive setting.
perf.cvar.r_dota_color_correction.label: Color Correction
perf.cvar.r_dota_render_2d_skybox.label: Skybox Clouds
perf.cvar.engine_no_focus_sleep.label: Alt-Tab Sleep (ms)
perf.cvar.r_experimental_lag_limiter.tip: VSync ON with less input lag.
perf.cvar.r_low_latency.label: NVIDIA Reflex
perf.cvar.r_low_latency.tip: Reduces system latency on NVIDIA GPUs.
perf.cvar.rate.label: Net Rate
perf.cvar.cl_updaterate.label: Update Rate
perf.cvar.cl_interp_ratio.label: Interp Ratio
perf.cvar.cl_smooth.label: Smooth Interp
perf.launch.desc.novid: Skips the intro video on startup.
perf.launch.desc.skip_download_player_in: Skips downloading player info on load.
perf.launch.desc.prewarm_panorama: Pre-warms UI to reduce first-load stutters.
